description:
No .github/ exists. Neither the default `mix test` lane nor the `mix test.integration` alias (which gates the real path-dep + archive install paths) runs automatically.

Add .github/workflows/ci.yml:
- mix compile --warnings-as-errors
- mix test
- mix test.integration (downstream_adoption + archive_install)
- (optional) mix format --check-formatted

Pin Elixir 1.19 / OTP 28 to match the declared `elixir: "~> 1.19"` constraint.

Acceptance: CI runs green on push/PR.

comments.text: WORKER_ERROR: cannot deliver 'CI runs green' — `mix test.integration` is RED on clean main HEAD (196bb8c). The archive_install_test fails reproducibly (in isolation too): `mix mutagen` from an archive-installed host aborts with runtime_load_failed, Last error {:telemetry,{'no such file or directory','telemetry.app'}}. Root cause: the built .ez bundles only mutagen_ex's own ebin (probe/ebin/mutagen_ex.app + Elixir.MutagenEx.Telemetry.beam) and does NOT include the :telemetry dep, so the archive runtime-repair path (mutagen.cli.r16) can't load telemetry. This is a pre-existing product bug, out of scope for an 'add CI workflow' ticket. compile --warnings-as-errors, mix test (640/0), and the downstream_adoption integration test all pass; only archive_install is red. Not iterating per worker contract — orchestrator decides: fix archive telemetry bundling first, or descope archive_install from the gating CI lane.

PARENT EPIC BRANCH RENAMED (2026-06-23): merge-back target epic/hcs -> mutagen-hcs/hex-pm-publish-hygiene. This stage's own branch/worktree are unchanged (mutagen-hcs.5/github-actions-ci @ ../mutagen_ex-github-actions-ci). Upstream tracking repointed.

SCOPE_EXPANSION: spawned mutagen-hcs.7 to make the archive dependency-free (drop telemetry hook API + rewire progress onto on_site_completed), which the archive_install integration lane requires before CI can gate it green. .5 now blocked_by .7. Per user decision (Option A, 2026-06-23). Does not consume a bounce attempt.

IMPLEMENTED (mutagen-hcs.5 --impl-only)

Added .github/workflows/ci.yml (runs on push + pull_request). HEAD: b0337bb (advanced past base 3420a93).

mix test.integration alias contents (mix.exs):
  test --include downstream_integration --include archive_integration --include self_mutation test/integration

Local pass results (Elixir 1.19.5 / OTP 28, MIX_ENV=test):
- mix format --check-formatted    -> OK
- mix compile --warnings-as-errors -> exit 0, no warnings
- mix test                        -> 643 tests, 0 failures (22 excluded)
- mix test.integration            -> 3 tests, 0 failures (incl. archive_integration; .ez built green)

Workflow pins Elixir 1.19 / OTP 28 via erlef/setup-beam@v1, caches deps + _build keyed on mix.lock. Did NOT add mix spec.check (pre-existing RED). Scope: .github/** only; mix.exs untouched.

VERIFY: PASS
Session: 033814be-550f-48f5-ab4a-ac141d9e94a3
Log: ~/.claude/projects/-Users-mz-dev-mz-mutagen-ex/033814be-550f-48f5-ab4a-ac141d9e94a3.jsonl

Mechanical checks:
- Files touched: 1 (.github/workflows/ci.yml only? yes — 51 insertions, mix.exs untouched, elixir "~> 1.19" constraint intact)

Semantic checks:
- YAML valid + correct: PASS. Parses cleanly. Triggers on push AND pull_request (the PyYAML `on: -> True` quirk is a YAML 1.1 boolean artifact, not a defect — GitHub's parser reads `on:` correctly; both push/pull_request keys confirmed present). erlef/setup-beam@v1 with elixir-version "1.19" / otp-version "28" matches the `elixir: "~> 1.19"` mix.exs constraint and the local toolchain (Elixir 1.19.5 / OTP 28). actions/checkout@v4 present as first step. actions/cache@v4 keyed on hashFiles('**/mix.lock') with a restore-keys prefix fallback — will hit. MIX_ENV=test set at job env so test deps compile. Step order is correct: checkout -> setup-beam -> cache -> deps.get -> format -> compile --warnings-as-errors -> test -> test.integration. deps.get runs before any compile/test. permissions: contents:read (least-privilege).
- Each gated command green locally (Elixir 1.19.5 / OTP 28, MIX_ENV=test, from stage worktree):
  - format = PASS (mix format --check-formatted, exit 0)
  - compile --warnings-as-errors = PASS (exit 0, no warnings)
  - test = PASS (643 tests, 0 failures, 22 excluded; seed 722568 — no flake)
  - test.integration = PASS (3 tests, 0 failures; includes tags downstream_integration + archive_integration + self_mutation, covering downstream_adoption_test.exs, archive_install_test.exs, self_mutation_test.exs; archive .ez built green — the pre-.7 telemetry bundling RED is resolved)
- Does NOT gate on red spec.check: CONFIRMED. No `mix spec.check`/`spec.validate` anywhere in .github/. CI will not be RED through the known pre-existing mutagen.ast verification_command_failed.

- CI-environment risks (TTY/network/local-only assumptions): Low.
  - deps.get needs network on first run / cache miss — normal and expected on a GitHub runner.
  - Integration tests boot tmp Mix projects via System.cmd and build an .ez; they use the installed Mix/Hex toolchain, no TTY, no external network beyond what deps.get already covers. No local-only state observed.
  - Cosmetic only: a `:test_load_filters` warning for test/integration/support/self_mutation_harness.exs (support file not matching the test pattern). Does not fail the run on CI or locally.

Verdict: PASS

Notes (advisory only):
- Workflow runs a single ubuntu-latest job (no matrix). Fine for the stated 1.19/28 pin, but a version typo would only surface on that one combo — acceptable for this ticket's scope.
- `on:` with no branch filter means CI runs on pushes to every branch and every PR; that is the acceptance intent ("push/PR") and is the broadest-safe choice.

AUDIT: APPROVE (auto — selective audit)
Session: 033814be-550f-48f5-ab4a-ac141d9e94a3
Log: ~/.claude-remembers/projects/-Users-mz-dev-mz-mutagen-ex/033814be-550f-48f5-ab4a-ac141d9e94a3.jsonl
Reasoning: VERIFY PASS — single-file .github/workflows/ci.yml, 0 scope violations. YAML valid; correct push+PR triggers, Elixir 1.19/OTP 28 pin via erlef/setup-beam, cache keyed on mix.lock, correct step order. All four gated lanes independently re-run GREEN (format, compile --warnings-as-errors, test 643/0, test.integration 3/0 incl. archive). Correctly omits the pre-existing-red spec.check. No judgment call remaining.
APPROVED (auto). Merged --ff-only into epic. Gates green: mix test --seed 0 643/0, format clean, deps.unlock clean. Closing.

title: Add GitHub Actions CI
